design_element: PlanProposal.__post_init__ computes SHA-256 from deterministic fields. Transition G-P4 blocks plan oscillation by comparing plan_hash. Deterministic Handoff Table (03_orchestration_lifecycle.md §4) documents expected paths for 3 input patterns.

requirement: Data models must be defined outside execution engine modules.
design_element: All 18+ dataclasses and 8 enums defined in artifacts/design/phase_g/models/02_planning_models.py. No ExecutionCore, Engine, or Governance types appear in any model.

requirement: Every operation must be recoverable via trace ID.
design_element: Every dataclass carries orchestration_trace_id. Correlation ID chain (04_integration_blueprint.md §2) propagates orchestration_trace_id → cognitive_trace_id → enterprise_trace_id → F1 trace_id. All 9 EventBus hook events carry orchestration_trace_id.

requirement: Agents must operate independently of governance policies.
design_element: IPlannerAgent, ICriticAgent, IOptimizerAgent are independent protocols with no governance imports. CriticAgent evaluates constraints passed as data, not by invoking governance internals. Domain Ownership (models/02_planning_models.py:DomainOwnership) explicitly separates agent boundaries.

requirement: No global mutable state. All state must be instance-scoped.
design_element: All models carry tenant_id for explicit scoping. G-P2 guard (scope_verified) blocks cross-tenant plans. TenantScopeViolationReport emitted on violations. No module-level stores in design artifacts.
design_evidence_path: models/02_planning_models.py (all tenant-aware types carry tenant_id); 03_orchestration_lifecycle.md §2 G-P2; protocols/01_cognitive_orchestration_protocols.py:ICriticAgent.reject_with_reason scope_verified param

design_element: IOptimizerAgent protocol: optimize_execution_graph must be deterministic (same dag + resource_profile → same OptimizedDAG). G-P7 enforces proposal_hash unchanged between APPROVED→OPTIMIZING. PlanProposal._hash is deterministic from intent + nodes + tenant.
ICriticAgent.reject_with_reason() requires scope_verified param. G-P2 guard blocks cross-tenant plans without scope_verified=True. TenantScopeViolationReport carries expected vs detected tenant.

requirement: Orchestration must not import from ExecutionCore or runtime.
design_element: Zero imports from core/ in any Phase G design artifact. Agents interact with Memory and Facade exclusively via EventBus (04_integration_blueprint.md §4 — Zero-Direct-Access Rule). All protocol parameters are plain dicts or model types.

requirement: Every component must implement a protocol.
design_element: Three @runtime_checkable protocols defined: IPlannerAgent, ICriticAgent, IOptimizerAgent. All methods have typed signatures with docstrings. Enums (OrchestrationEventType, RiskLevel, ResolutionStatus, OrchestrationState) define shared contracts.

Deterministic Handoff Table (03_orchestration_lifecycle.md §4) specifies 3 input patterns and their expected paths/ hashes. G-P4 blocks plan oscillation by hash comparison. State machine (T0–T9) is deterministic for same inputs.

canon_ref: STOP CONDITION: Model missing tenant_id or isolation_policy
requirement: No planning model may omit tenant_id.
design_element: Every model with tenant data (PlanProposal, RevisedPlan, CritiqueReport, ValidationFailure, NegotiationCycle, OptimizedDAG, ParallelHints, PlanConflictReport, CriticRejectionReport, OptimizationAppliedReport, TenantScopeViolationReport) carries tenant_id field.

canon_ref: STOP CONDITION: ICriticAgent accept_unsafe without scope_verified
requirement: Critic must not accept cross-tenant plans without verification.
design_element: ICriticAgent.reject_with_reason() docstring explicitly states: 'Must refuse to call this if scope_verified is False and the violation involves cross-tenant context (RULE 3).' G-P2 guard enforces at transition level.

canon_ref: STOP CONDITION: Integration must comply with LAW 9 and RULE 1
requirement: Integration Blueprint must not violate Governance Independence or cross-layer rules.
design_element: Blueprint §4 enforces Zero-Direct-Access Rule. Agents interact via EventBus only. No governance data flows into agent logic. No ExecutionCore references in any protocol.

canon_ref: STOP CONDITION: No executable code in core/
requirement: All design must be in artifacts/, never in core/.
design_element: All 5 files are under artifacts/design/phase_g/. Zero files created or modified under core/ or tests/. No .py files with executable logic outside type definitions and dataclasses.
